name: @appstrate/webhooks
description: Generic webhook provider — send HTTP requests to any URL with optional authentication

secret_header_name.description: Custom authentication header name (e.g. X-Webhook-Secret) — optional

secret_header_value.description: Secret value for the authentication header — optional

steps.label: Enter the webhook URL you want to send data to
Optionally configure a secret header for authentication
Test the connection by sending a test payload
